items.title_en: Steam Machine launches today
items.title_zh: Steam 机器
items.summary_en: Valve's Steam Machine hardware page surfaces its long-running attempt to bring PC gaming into the living room with console-like form factors. The effort illustrates the ongoing tension between performance, usability, and ecosystem control in living-room gaming hardware.
items.summary_zh: Valve 在 Steam 机器硬件页再次出现，展示其将 PC 游戏带入客厅的长期尝试，强调性能、易用性与生态系统控制之间的权衡。此举反映出游戏硬件在家庭娱乐中的定位与挑战。

items.title_en: AI Built a Nuke and Still Lost
items.title_zh: AI 构建核武器却仍然迷失
items.summary_en: Presents a provocative scenario where an AI designs a nuclear weapon yet still fails to achieve its broader goals, illustrating misalignment and the fragility of long-horizon planning. The piece underscores why strong safety and alignment controls are essential when pursuing ambitious AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个极端设定展示：即使 AI 设计出核武器等危险工具，仍可能无法实现更高层次的目标，暴露出对齐与目标设定的局限。强调在追求强大 AI 系统之时，须加强安全控制与对齐机制。

items.title_en: The new HTTP QUERY method explained
items.title_zh: 新 HTTP QUERY 方法解读
items.summary_en: A proposed HTTP QUERY method treats server-side queries as a first-class operation, letting clients submit structured queries and receive results in a standardized way. The write-up outlines expected semantics, payload formats, and caching considerations, and discusses potential benefits for API ergonomics alongside adoption challenges for tooling and proxies.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一种将服务器端查询作为 HTTP 端点的新方法，让客户端提交结构化查询并获得标准化结果。文中讨论了该方法的语义、负载格式与缓存行为，以及它可能带来的 API 设计简化，同时也提出工具链和代理的采用挑战。

items.title_en: Will It Mythos?
items.title_zh: 它会成就 Mythos 吗？
items.summary_en: A concise look at whether Mythos lives up to expectations, examining what the project promises and what challenges remain.
items.summary_zh: 简要评估 Mythos 是否如期实现，探讨它的承诺与面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Flock-Powered Police Chiefs Stalking Women Shows Why Warrants Are Needed
items.title_zh: Flock 监控网络让警察追踪女性，凸显为何需要搜令
items.summary_en: A report shows police using a private surveillance network to track a woman, underscoring the risks of warrantless, opaque data sharing. It reinforces why warrants, oversight, and clear data governance are essential when relying on third-party camera networks.
items.summary_zh: 报道揭示警察依赖私人监控网络追踪一名女性，凸显在使用第三方摄像网络时，缺乏授权与透明度的监控带来的风险。强调在此类数据资源下，必须有搜令、监督与明确的数据治理。

items.title_en: GLM-5.2 – How to Run Locally
items.title_zh: Unsloth GLM-5.2：如何在本地运行
items.summary_en: Offers practical steps to run the GLM-5.2 model locally, enabling offline inference without relying on cloud services. Running locally improves privacy and latency and gives developers more control, but it also demands hardware and setup considerations.
items.summary_zh: 提供将 GLM-5.2 本地化运行的实用步骤，使离线推理不再依赖云端。 本地运行提升隐私与延迟控制，但需要合适的硬件和安装配置。

items.title_en: 1,700 free online courses from top universities
items.title_zh: 来自顶尖大学的1700门免费在线课程
items.summary_en: OpenCulture lists 1,700 free online courses from top universities, offering broad subject coverage and insights into the value and limits of free learning credentials.
items.summary_zh: OpenCulture 汇集了来自顶尖大学的1700门免费在线课程，覆盖广泛主题并解析免费学习资源的价值与局限。

items.title_en: VibeThinker: 3B param model that beats Opus 4.5 on reasoning with novel SFT+GRPO
items.title_zh: VibeThinker：3B 参数模型在推理方面击败 Opus 4.5，采用新颖的 SFT+GRPO
items.summary_en: VibeThinker is a 3B-parameter model that reportedly beats Opus 4.5 on reasoning thanks to a novel SFT+GRPO training regime. This challenges the idea that bigger models are needed for strong reasoning and highlights new fine-tuning strategies.
items.summary_zh: VibeThinker 是一个 3B 参数模型，据称在推理任务中胜过 Opus 4.5，使用了新颖的 SFT+GRPO 训练方法。这一结果挑战了“大模型才有强推理能力”的直觉，并突出了新的微调策略。

items.title_en: Canada plans 'nuclear renaissance' with up to 10 reactors built by 2040
items.title_zh: 加拿大计划到2040年建设多达10座核反应堆，开启核能复兴
items.summary_en: Canada outlines a nuclear renaissance with up to 10 reactors by 2040, signaling a larger low-carbon electricity mix. The plan emphasizes energy security and emissions goals while acknowledging regulatory, cost, and public-acceptance hurdles.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大提出到2040年建设多达10座核反应堆的核能复兴计划，意在扩大低碳电力结构。该方案强调能源安全与减排目标，同时面临监管、成本与公众接受度的挑战。

items.title_en: Pledging another $400k to the Zig software foundation
items.title_zh: 再向 Zig 软件基金会捐赠40万美元
items.summary_en: Zig's ecosystem keeps growing as a further $400k is pledged to its software foundation. The donation signals continued community support and could accelerate language tooling, compiler work, and ecosystem initiatives that push Zig toward broader adoption and stability.
items.summary_zh: Zig 生态系统再次获得资金支持，向其软件基金会再捐出40万美元，显示社区的持续支持。捐款有望推动语言工具链、编译器改进和生态项目，加速 Zig 的普及与稳定性提升。

items.title_en: Deno Desktop
items.title_zh: Deno 桌面版
items.summary_en: Deno Desktop introduces a cross-platform desktop runtime for building apps with TypeScript and JavaScript using the Deno toolchain. The docs outline how to create, package, and run desktop apps with Deno, bridging web UI tech with native OS capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Deno Desktop 引入一个跨平台桌面运行时，方便用 TypeScript/JavaScript 基于 Deno 构建桌面应用。文档介绍了创建、打包与运行桌面应用的方式，以及与原生操作系统能力的对接。

items.title_en: In praise of memcached
items.title_zh: 致敬 memcached
items.summary_en: Memcached is celebrated for its enduring simplicity and low-latency caching, proving surprisingly effective at scale. The piece shares practical patterns and caveats for production use.
items.summary_zh: Memcached 凭借简洁性和低延迟缓存能力在大规模场景中依然有效。文中给出实际使用中的模式与注意事项。

items.title_en: EU Member States (and Google) suddenly want to keep cookie banners
items.title_zh: 欧盟成员国（及谷歌）突然想保留 Cookie 横幅
items.summary_en: Notes that EU member states, along with Google, want to keep cookie banners as a privacy tool, despite debates over consent fatigue and compliance burdens.
items.summary_zh: 指出欧盟成员国及谷歌希望继续保留 Cookie 横幅作为隐私工具，尽管关于同意疲劳和合规成本的讨论仍在继续。分析监管动向与行业关切，以及这对跨生态系统的跟踪实现意味何在。

items.title_en: OpenAI DayBreak – GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.title_zh: OpenAI DayBreak：GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary_en: OpenAI's DayBreak program centers on security, showcasing GPT-5.5-Cyber capabilities and a framework for safer AI deployments. The effort outlines safety practices, threat modeling, and collaboration with industry to harden AI systems against cyber threats.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI DayBreak 着眼于安全，展示 GPT-5.5-Cyber 的能力与更安全的 AI 部署框架。该计划强调安全实践、威胁建模，并与行业合作以提升 AI 系统在网络威胁面前的防护能力。

items.title_en: The text in Claude Code’s “Extended Thinking” output
items.title_zh: Claude Code 的“扩展思考”输出中的文本并非真实思考
items.summary_en: The Extended Thinking content appears to be AI-generated text rather than genuine human-like reasoning. This raises concerns about how much we should trust explanations from coding assistants and the need for transparent disclosure of reasoning processes.
items.summary_zh: 扩展思考输出看似 AI 生成的文本，而非真实的推理过程。这让人们反思在代码助手中对解释的信任程度，以及是否应透明披露推理过程。

items.title_en: Optocam Zero: a Pi Zero based digital camera made using off the shelf components
items.title_zh: Optocam Zero：基于 Pi Zero 的现成部件数字相机
items.summary_en: Optocam Zero demonstrates a compact, Pi Zero-based digital camera built entirely from off-the-shelf parts. The project shows how far a tiny board can go with modular components, trading off image quality and battery life for accessibility and affordability.
items.summary_zh: Optocam Zero 展示了一个基于 Pi Zero 的小巧数字相机，用的是现成组件。这个开源硬件项目证明了在极小的单板机上拼装成像设备的可行性，同时也暴露了成像质量和电池寿命等权衡。

items.title_en: Japanese symbols that speak without words
items.title_zh: 无需语言也能表达意义的日本符号
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Japanese symbols that convey meaning without words—kanji, kana, and visual iconography—and examines how typography and cultural context shape interpretation for design.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理日本符号在不依赖语言的情况下传达意义的方式——包括汉字、假名与视觉符号学——以及设计师能从中学到的表达技巧。讨论文化语境如何影响解读，并将这些信号应用于 UI/UX 与品牌设计。

items.title_en: An Introduction to YOLO26
items.title_zh: YOLO26 入门
items.summary_en: YOLO26 is the latest in the YOLO family, delivering real-time object detection with improved speed and accuracy. The post outlines architectural tweaks and training ideas that enable end-to-end performance.
items.summary_zh: YOLO26 作为 YOLO 家族的最新成员，在实时对象检测上提供更快的速度与更高的准确性。文章介绍了改进的架构和训练思路，以实现端到端的高性能。

items.title_en: Moebius: 0.2B image inpainting model with 10B-level performance
items.title_zh: Moebius：0.2B 图像修复模型具备10B级别性能
items.summary_en: A 200M-parameter image inpainting model claims performance on par with much larger models. If validated, it demonstrates dramatic efficiency gains from architectural improvements and training tricks, making high-quality inpainting more accessible on consumer hardware. This could shift how we deploy AI-assisted image editing.
items.summary_zh: 一个约 2 亿参数的图像修复模型声称达到 10B 参数级别的性能。若属实，这意味着通过架构改进和训练技巧实现更高效的修复能力，使 AI 辅助的图像编辑在普通硬件上更易落地，可能改变部署方式。

items.title_en: Job application asked for my SAT scores
items.title_zh: 求职申请竟然要我的 SAT 成绩
items.summary_en: A job application asked for SAT scores, prompting debate on whether such data is relevant or appropriate for employment. It underscores the broader push for privacy-respecting, skills-based hiring.
items.summary_zh: 一份求职申请竟要求提供 SAT 成绩，引发关于隐私和公平招聘的讨论。标准化考试成绩并非评估工作能力的可靠依据，收集这类信息可能带来歧视风险，推动以技能为基础的招聘。

items.title_en: ytr: YouTube Radio for Emacs
items.title_zh: ytr：供 Emacs 使用的 YouTube Radio
items.summary_en: ytr implements a lightweight YouTube radio experience inside Emacs, enabling keyboard-driven browsing and playback of YouTube audio. For power users, it's an example of integrating modern streaming services into a programmable editor, though reliability and licensing caveats apply.
items.summary_zh: ytr 在 Emacs 中实现了一个轻量的 YouTube Radio 体验，便于在编辑器内通过键盘浏览并播放 YouTube 音频。对于爱好者来说，这是将现代流媒体服务与可编程编辑器结合的有趣案例，但在可靠性和授权方面存在潜在约束。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ideate a trading strategy with an Ex-Citadel Trader
items.title_zh: Show HN：与前 Citadel 交易员共同构思交易策略
items.summary_en: Show HN features a collaborative ideation session with an ex-Citadel trader to brainstorm trading strategies. The post demonstrates how domain expertise can sharpen hypothesis generation, risk-aware design, and rapid iteration in algorithmic trading.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了与前 Citadel 交易员的合作，头脑风暴并原型化交易策略。通过行业经验的输入，展示了如何提升假设生成质量、设计时的风险意识，以及对算法交易的快速迭代能力。

items.title_en: Prompt Injection as Role Confusion
items.title_zh: 将提示注入描述为角色混淆的视角
items.summary_en: A new framing for prompt injection treats attacker prompts as role-confusion, where the model misinterprets instruction as part of its role. This reframing helps analyze security boundaries in AI apps and suggests mitigations around system prompts and role constraints.
items.summary_zh: 将提示注入描述为角色混淆的视角，指出攻击者的指令可能被模型错误地纳入其角色定义中。此分析有助于理解 AI 应用的安全边界，并提出对系统提示和角色约束的缓解策略。

items.title_en: British Columbia, Time Zones, and Postgres
items.title_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省的时区变更与 PostgreSQL
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL uses the IANA tz database to handle time zone rules, including changes in British Columbia. The piece stresses keeping tzdata up to date and using proper time zone handling (TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) to avoid DST-related surprises.
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 通过 IANA tz 数据库处理时区规则，包括不列颠哥伦比亚省的最新时区调整。文章强调保持 tzdata 更新，并正确使用带时区的时间字段，以避免夏令时等变更带来的问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oak – Git alternative designed for agents
items.title_zh: Oak—为代理设计的 Git 替代工具
items.summary_en: Show HN: Oak introduces a Git-like workflow tailored for autonomous agents, enabling agent-driven versioning, tracing, and collaboration. It aims to streamline repeated decision-making tasks in AI workflows and improve reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Oak 提供了面向自主代理的类似 Git 的工作流，支持代理驱动的版本控制、跟踪与协作，旨在简化 AI 工作流中的重复决策并提升可复现性。

items.title_en: Ultralytics YOLO26: Unified Real-Time End-to-End Vision Models
items.title_zh: Ultralytics YOLO26：统一的实时端到端视觉模型
items.summary_en: Ultralytics YOLO26 introduces a unified, real-time end-to-end vision model aimed at simplifying deployment across detection, segmentation, and related tasks. The approach emphasizes cross-task consistency and edge-friendly performance, reducing the engineering burden of multi-task vision systems.
items.summary_zh: Ultralytics 发布 YOLO26，一体化的实时端到端视觉模型，致力于以单一架构实现检测、分割等任务，简化部署。该方法在边缘设备上的性能与跨任务的一致性之间寻求平衡，降低多任务视觉系统的工程负担。

items.title_en: Show HN: Got sick of ads, so I made my own logic puzzle site
items.title_zh: Show HN：无广告的逻辑谜题网站
items.summary_en: Show HN: a creator built an ad-free logic puzzle site focused on clean, fast gameplay.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：作者打造了一个无广告的逻辑谜题网站，强调快速、无干扰的玩法体验。文中介绍了技术栈、设计取舍，以及维持一个小型社区驱动站点的要点。

items.title_en: Finding the Best Dog Treat with Statistics
items.title_zh: 用统计找出最佳狗零食
items.summary_en: A data-driven look at evaluating dog treats, illustrating how experimental design, sample size, and basic stats can quantify palatability and nutritional trade-offs. The piece translates a pet-care topic into a mini stats tutorial with practical takeaways.
items.summary_zh: 以数据驱动的方法评估狗狗零食，展示了如何通过实验设计、样本量和基本统计量来量化口味和营养之间的权衡。这一案例把宠物护理问题变成了可落地的统计小教程。

items.title_en: Chevron signs 20-year power agreement with Microsoft for West Texas data center
items.title_zh: Chevron 与微软签订 West Texas 数据中心20年用电协议
items.summary_en: Chevron signs a 20-year power purchase agreement with Microsoft to power a West Texas data center, signaling corporate demand for clean energy and long-term reliability. The deal highlights how large buyers coordinate with utilities to decarbonize and stabilize energy costs for cloud infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 雪佛龙与微软签署在西德克萨斯州数据中心的20年购电协议，显示企业对清洁能源与长期供电可靠性的需求。此交易体现大型买家如何与公用事业方协作，以实现云基础设施的低碳化与成本稳定。

items.title_en: DisplayMate
items.title_zh: DisplayMate 评测工具
items.summary_en: DisplayMate is a rigorous display testing site known for objective color accuracy, calibration, and performance metrics. For hardware teams and enthusiasts, it provides benchmarks that guide monitor buyers and design choices.
items.summary_zh: DisplayMate 是一个以客观色彩准确度、校准与性能指标著称的显示器评测平台，为硬件团队与发烧友提供有助于选购与设计的基准数据。

items.title_en: Show HN: A pure ARM64 Assembly web server, now on Linux with CGI for no reason
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个纯 ARM64 汇编网页服务器，在 Linux 上通过 CGI 运行（纯粹出于爱好）
items.summary_en: A pure ARM64 assembly web server running on Linux with CGI demonstrates extreme minimalism and hands-on optimization. The project spotlights the challenges and quirks of hand-written networking code and argues for educational or experimental value in ultra-low-level servers.
items.summary_zh: 一个纯 ARM64 汇编实现的网页服务器，移植到 Linux 并使用 CGI，纯属出于兴趣与极简主义的探索。项目体现了手写网络代码的挑战与极低级实现的潜在教育与实验价值。

items.title_en: Who Does What? Team Topologies for the Agentic Platform
items.title_zh: 谁做什么？代理平台的团队拓扑
items.summary_en: Analyzes applying Team Topologies to an agentic platform, detailing which teams should own various platform capabilities as autonomous agents operate at scale. It argues for aligning platform, product, and operations teams to reduce cognitive load, speed incident response, and accelerate AI-powered automation.
items.summary_zh: 本文将 Team Topologies 的思路应用于具代理能力的平台，阐述在大规模自主代理运作下各团队应承担的责任。强调让平台、产品与运维团队协同工作，以降低认知负载、提升故障响应并加速 AI 自动化的落地。

items.title_en: Death by a Thousand Comments
items.title_zh: 千条评论之死
items.summary_en: Examines how the abundance of comments can drown substantive discussion, reducing signal-to-noise and making it harder to extract value from threads. Proposes strategies like better abstraction, moderation, and upvoting systems to restore productive discourse.
items.summary_zh: 讨论大量评论如何使有价值的讨论被噪声淹没，降低信号等级，让人难以从话题中获得有用信息。提出改进的策略，如更好的分层、适当的审核和投票机制，以恢复高效的交流。

items.title_en: Die analysis of the 8087 math coprocessor's fast bit shifter (2020)
items.title_zh: 8087 数学协处理器的快速位移器 Die 分析
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the 8087 math coprocessor’s die reveals how its fast bit shifter was implemented, shedding light on early floating-point acceleration and microarchitectural tradeoffs. The post adds historical perspective on performance engineering.
items.summary_zh: 对 8087 数学协处理器的芯片进行深度分析，揭示其快速位移器的实现方式，展示早期浮点运算加速的微架构权衡，并提供对性能工程的历史视角。

items.title_en: Help I accidentally a wigglegram
items.title_zh: 帮助！我不小心做成了 wigglegram
items.summary_en: An amusing mishap shows how wigglegrams—animated sequences stitched from multiple frames—are created and how easily one can post an unintended motion. The piece breaks down the quirks of producing these effects and offers tips for fixes or avoiding accidental wiggles.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的失误揭示了 wigglegram（由多帧拼接成的动画）是如何生成的，以及如何无意中发布带有动效的图片。文中解析了这类效果的制作要点，并给出修正或避免意外动效的建议。

items.title_en: Polymarket has flooded social media with deceptive videos by paid creators
items.title_zh: Polymarket 用付费创作者制作的误导性视频充斥社媒
items.summary_en: Polymarket has flooded social media with deceptive videos created by paid creators, raising concerns about misinformation and platform governance. The development underscores the risks of monetized, manipulated content in decentralized social ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 通过付费创作者制作的误导性视频充斥社交媒体，引发对错讯信息与平台治理的担忧。这反映出去中心化社交生态中货币化、操控内容的风险。

items.title_en: Matrix and Quaternion FAQ
items.title_zh: 矩阵与四元数常见问题解答
items.summary_en: Presents a concise FAQ clarifying matrices, quaternions, and their practical use in graphics and robotics. It helps developers understand representations, algebra, and common pitfalls when applying linear algebra to transformations.
items.summary_zh: 提供关于矩阵与四元数的简明问答，澄清它们的代数、表示和在图形学与机器人学中的实际应用。帮助开发者避免在进行变换相关的线性代数时的常见误解。

items.title_en: My Mathematical Regression
items.title_zh: 我的数学回归
items.summary_en: A personal reflection on a shift in mathematical thinking, recognizing the limits of formal models and embracing intuition or alternative methods. The piece uses a regression metaphor to discuss how mathematical practice evolves with experience.
items.summary_zh: 作者反思在数学思考中的转变，认识到纯粹模型的局限并尝试引入直觉或替代方法。文章以回归的隐喻探讨数学实践如何随经验成长与修正。

items.title_en: Canyon HUD helmet for road riding
items.title_zh: Canyon 公路骑行抬头显示头盔
items.summary_en: Canyon's road-hiking helmet includes a built-in HUD that projects ride data and navigation into the rider's line of sight. While it could boost awareness and route follow-through, engineers warn about distraction, battery drain, and privacy implications as sensor data may be collected.
items.summary_zh: Canyon 推出集成抬头显示的公路骑行头盔，实现在骑行中实时显示速度、导航等信息。该设计有望提升骑手安全与决策能力，但也引发分心、续航以及传感数据隐私等问题的讨论。

items.title_en: Cyberdecks, going analog, and convivial technology
items.title_zh: 赛博甲板：走向模拟化与宜人科技
items.summary_en: Explores a trend toward analog, offline-friendly cyberdecks and a convivial tech culture that prioritizes privacy and local-first workflows. The piece argues these setups can foster resilience and community in a connected world.
items.summary_zh: 探讨走向模拟化、离线友好型的赛博甲板以及更为友善的技术文化，强调隐私与本地优先工作流的重要性。这种风格的设备被视为在互联世界中提升韧性与社区感的途径。

items.title_en: Windows NT for GameCube/Wii
items.title_zh: GameCube/Wii 的 Windows NT
items.summary_en: A hobby project to port Windows NT to GameCube/Wii hardware explores feasibility, compatibility, and the engineering challenges of running an older OS on game consoles.
items.summary_zh: 一个爱好者项目尝试将 Windows NT 移植到 GameCube/Wii 硬件，探讨在游戏机上运行老系统的可行性、兼容性与工程挑战。

items.title_en: Giant Banana Pulled Over: Driver Says Cops Have Stopped Him 100s of Times
items.title_zh: 巨型香蕉被拦下：司机称警察多次拦车
items.summary_en: A quirky local story about a driver claiming police stopped him hundreds of times over a giant banana, highlighting how odd anecdotes spread online.
items.summary_zh: 一个关于司机因巨型香蕉而声称被警察多次拦下的怪异本地新闻，凸显这类离奇轶事在网上的传播。

items.title_en: Improvements to Std:Format in C++26
items.title_zh: C++26 中 std::format 的改进
items.summary_en: A discussion of proposed improvements to std::format in C++26, aiming to simplify formatting for user-defined types, extend specifiers, and boost performance. The notes cover enhanced format contexts, broader type support, and potential compile-time optimizations that could streamline modern C++ output.
items.summary_zh: C++26 的 std::format 提出了一系列改进，目标是让对自定义类型的格式化、更丰富的格式说明符，以及性能提升更容易实现。讨论包括改进的格式上下文、对更多类型的支持，以及潜在的编译时优化，可能让输出代码更简洁。

items.title_en: Is it time for a new Embedded Linux build system?
items.title_zh: 嵌入式 Linux 构建系统：现在该换新吗？
items.summary_en: Argues for a new embedded Linux build system to address reproducibility, speed, and toolchain challenges in constrained environments, weighing candidates and proposing a path forward.
items.summary_zh: 提出在嵌入式 Linux 领域引入新型构建系统，以解决可重复性、速度与工具链等挑战，评估候选方案并提出前进路径。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pagecast – Publish Markdown/HTML Reports to Cloudflare Pages
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pagecast 让 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages
items.summary_en: Show HN: Pagecast enables publishing Markdown/HTML reports to Cloudflare Pages with a simple, automated workflow for sharing docs and dashboards.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Pagecast 让将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages 变得简单，并提供自动化工作流，用于分享文档与仪表板。

items.title_en: Plotnine
items.title_zh: Plotnine 数据可视化库
items.summary_en: Plotnine is a Python implementation of the grammar of graphics, offering a ggplot2-like API for layered, declarative visualizations. It enables composing plots with aesthetics, geoms, and facets, making complex charting accessible without heavy matplotlib boilerplate.
items.summary_zh: Plotnine 是一个在 Python 中实现的图形语法，提供类似 ggplot2 的分层、声明式绘图 API。通过美学映射、几何对象与分面等组件，便于构建复杂图表，减少对 matplotlib 的冗长代码。

items.title_en: 8086 Segmented Memory was a good idea
items.title_zh: 8086 分段内存曾是个好主意
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the 8086's segmented memory architecture was a sane compromise for its era, enabling efficient relocation and simple protection while keeping real-mode addressing manageable. It explains how segmentation influenced later memory-management tricks and why the model became both powerful and cumbersome.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 8086 的分段内存结构在当时是一个合理的折衷，便于地址重定位和基本保护，同时避免了直接的平坦地址空间。分段设计影响了后来的内存管理技巧，既强大又带来实现上的复杂性。

items.title_en: Package Managers need global hooks
items.title_zh: 包管理器需要全局钩子
items.summary_en: Make the case for global hooks in package managers to intercept install, update, and uninstall events for universal checks and policy enforcement. Standardized hooks could improve security, reproducibility, and observability across ecosystems despite diversity in tooling.
items.summary_zh: 主张在包管理器层面引入全局钩子，用于拦截安装、更新、卸载等事件，提供统一的检查与策略执行。标准化的钩子有望提升生态的安全性、可重复性与可观测性，尽管不同工具链间存在差异。

items.title_en: How Lume Works: The Retrieval Primitives
items.title_zh: Lume 的检索原语：实现原理
items.summary_en: Demystifies Lume's architecture around retrieval primitives—the building blocks for fast, scalable text and vector search. It shows how embeddable storage, vector search, filtering, and reranking can be composed into end-to-end retrieval pipelines for AI apps.
items.summary_zh: 解读 Lume 的检索原语——构建快速、可扩展的文本和向量检索的核心组件。展示如何将嵌入存储、向量检索、过滤与重新排序等原语组合成端到端的检索流水线，支撑 AI 应用。
